# phala_attestation (Data Source)

Fetches CVM attestation data on demand.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cvm_id` (String) CVM/App identifier used for attestation lookup.

### Read-Only

- `app_certificates_json` (String) Raw `app_certificates` array as JSON.
- `compose_file` (String)
- `error` (String)
- `id` (String) Stable state ID (same as cvm_id).
- `is_online` (Boolean)
- `is_public` (Boolean)
- `raw_json` (String) Full attestation response as JSON.
- `tcb_info_json` (String) Raw `tcb_info` object as JSON.
